name: Salim
title: Servant of Amir al-Mu'minin
shortDescription: The loyal servant of Amir al-Mu'minin Ali (AS) who, after years of serving the household of revelation, sacrificed his life for Hussain (AS).
fullStory:
Salim was the loyal and sincere servant of Amir al-Mu'minin Ali (AS). He had served in the house of revelation for years and closely witnessed Ali's (AS) prophetic character and morals. After the martyrdom of Amir al-Mu'minin (AS), he became a constant companion of his children and nurtured the love for Wilayah in his heart.

When Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan set out for Karbala, Salim joined the caravan without a speck of doubt. Having spent his life serving this family, he could not bear to see his master's son left alone among a multitude of enemies.

On the day of Ashura, despite being a servant, Salim possessed a free-spirited and brave soul. After getting permission from the Imam, he entered the battlefield with firmness and recited war poetry to show that the value of humans lies in piety and loyalty, not social status.

Salim wielded his sword with skill in the battlefield, proving his love for Ali (AS) and Hussain (AS) with every strike. He fought valiantly during the enemy's first attack when a rain of arrows poured down.

After a long battle, this loyal servant, who had learned freedom in Ali's (AS) school, was targeted by the enemy's vindictive blows, and his pure body fell on the scorching soil of Karbala to immortalize his name forever.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلى سالِمٍ مَوْلى أميرِ المُؤْمِنينَ...
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Salim, the servant of Amir al-Mu'minin.
